meta_description: Nylon parts provide high strength, temperature, and chemical resistance, making the material a popular choice for automotive and electric applications. Glass-filled and mineral filled options available.

sections.heading: Nylon Injection Molding
sections.text: Nylon Injection Molding Molded nylon parts provide high strength, temperature, and chemical resistance Get a Quote

sections.heading: Molded nylon parts provide high strength, temperature, and chemical resistance
sections.text: Molded nylon parts provide high strength, temperature, and chemical resistance

sections.heading: Nylon Applications
sections.text: Nylon Applications The PA nylon material is strong, with high-temperature strength, especially when reinforced. This material family offers wear resistance and chemical resistance—except to strong acids and bases—and is electrically conductive and shielding, making it useful for electrical and automotive applications including: Under-hood components Gears and bearings Latches Manifolds Thin-walled features Screws Structural parts (glass filled)
